title: actinidiaceae
intro: The actinidiaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, specifically the family of actinidia, a group of plants commonly known as kiwis or Chinese gooseberries. This family is characterized by its unique combination of characteristics, including the presence of a distinct, woody vine habit and the production of edible fruit. Actinidiaceae is a relatively small family with a limited distribution, primarily found in Asia and Eastern Europe. The plants within this family are often cultivated for their fruit, which is rich in nutrients and has a unique flavor profile.
